ai_summary: Asian Granito India Limited (AGIL) has completed the internal transfer of its 26% equity stakes in AGL Proteins Private Limited and Allomex Steel Private Limited to its wholly-owned subsidiary, AGL Industries Limited. This restructuring means these entities are no longer direct associate companies of AGIL but remain within the consolidated group structure as associates of the subsidiary. The transaction is an internal realignment with no change in ultimate beneficial ownership or control for AGIL, thus presenting no immediate red flags.
